findings.description: Audit point 1 — chat_pro unaffected: chat_pro() line 239 retains its own reasoning_effort='max' default. The _call() method default at line 103 is 'max' but both chat_flash and chat_pro always pass reasoning_effort explicitly via _call_with_retry, so _call() default is never used for flash. Confirmed no cross-contamination.

Audit point 2 — explicit callers unaffected: All 4 callers passing reasoning_effort explicitly (shadow_agent.py:164/343, ael_evolution.py:179, ecosystem_auditor.py:227, challenger_engine.py:212 via ShadowConfig) route through chat_with_integrity() with **kwargs passthrough. Explicit values override the default — no behavior change for these paths.

Audit point 3 — direct chat_flash callers verified safe: All 6 callers (flash_preprocessor x2, flash_triage, event_clusterer x2, investigation_loop, reflection_agent, chat_batch_flash) are data-extraction/classification tasks where minimal reasoning is correct. The original 'max' was a bug causing empty content (all output tokens consumed as reasoning_tokens). 'minimal' fixes this and is semantically appropriate for triage/parsing tasks.
findings.location: pipeline/flash_preprocessor.py:83/108, pipeline/flash_triage.py:149, pipeline/event_clusterer.py:673/737, pipeline/investigation_loop.py:144, pipeline/reflection_agent.py:120, gateway/async_client.py:312

findings.description: Security surface: X-Reasoning-Effort header (line 117) controls model-internal token allocation only. Does not affect authentication, authorization, data access, rate limiting, or any security boundary. No injection risk — the value is a hardcoded string from a function default, never user-controlled.

summary: Single-parameter default change fixing a real bug (Flash empty content due to reasoning tokens exhausting output budget). chat_pro unaffected (separate default). All 4 explicit reasoning_effort callers bypass the default via **kwargs. All 6 direct chat_flash callers are data-task modules where 'minimal' is semantically correct. Zero security surface change.
